**_A Note From Jeanie_**
Dear Derek,
With the session officially behind us, we are in recruitment mode—looking for good Republican candidates to run for office. In the Senate, there are 14 Republican senators who will run again and we’re looking for candidates to run against the Democrat senators. To date, the following folks are stepping up.

In the House, we have a bigger hill to climb, and we are working collaboratively to find candidates.
**There are two more open houses** scheduled at the NHRSC offices, **Wednesday, May 30** and **Wednesday, June 6**. After that, we will host a candidate training in mid-June for all those interested in learning more about campaigning and serving.
This is a call to action to every single person who receives this email. If you are interested in learning more about running for office or know of someone who would be a great candidate, please call our office at 225-9341.
Our party is just 21 days from the end of the filing period (filing period is June 6 – 15). I am confident that we have the right message, that New Hampshire is reaping the rewards of Republican leadership, and that together we will see a red wave in November. But we need to work together!
So, enjoy the Memorial Day weekend with family and friends—rest up—because it’s going to be a sprint come May 29th, and we need your help to put good candidates up to run.
FYI, our offices will be closed on Memorial Day, but we will be right back at it on Tuesday, the 29th.
Happy Memorial Day!

Sincerely,

Jeanie

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, MAY 25th | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, With the session officially behind us, we are in recruitment mode—looking for good Republican candidates to run for office. In the Senate, there are 14 Republican senators who will run again and we’re looking for candidates to run against the Democrat senators. To date, the following folks are stepping up. DemocratIncumbent Challenger: Dan LeClair Challenger: David Boutin Challenger: Carla Gericke In the House, we have a bigger hill to climb, and we are working collaboratively to find candidates. There are two more open houses scheduled at the NHRSC offices, Wednesday, May 30 and Wednesday, June 6. After that, we will host a candidate training in mid-June for all those interested in learning more about campaigning and serving. This is a call to action to every single person who receives this email. If you are interested in learning more about running for office or know of someone who would be a great candidate, please call our office at 225-9341. Our party is just 21 days from the end of the filing period (filing period is June 6 – 15). I am confident that we have the right message, that New Hampshire is reaping the rewards of Republican leadership, and that together we will see a red wave in November. But we need to work together! So, enjoy the Memorial Day weekend with family and friends—rest up—because it’s going to be a sprint come May 29th, and we need your help to put good candidates up to run. FYI, our offices will be closed on Memorial Day, but we will be right back at it on Tuesday, the 29th. Happy Memorial Day! Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHTS UPCOMING EVENTS nh.gop/events nh.gop/events nh.gop/events nh.gop/events nh.gop/events PHOTO OF THE WEEK Our NHGOP Veterans Coalition at our Military and Veterans Appreciation BBQ! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican Spotlight this week is Paul Chevalier! Paul helped us organize a great NHGOP Veterans event, our Military and Veterans Appreciation BBQ! Thank you, Paul, for your service to our country and our party! Paul Chevalier is a retired Sergeant Major of the United States Marine Corps. Peter, **Our job is to replace Michael McCaul**. Since the Republican gerrymander of 2003, McCaul has been the TX-10 "representative," refusing to meet with constitutents and advancing only his own interests. He is a loyal Trump ally and one of the wealthiest members of Congress. **McCaul feels safe in his power. But we are not safe**. Thanks to McCaul, **our health care is under attack**. Thanks to McCaul, **teachers pay more taxes** while he and his wealthy friends pay less. Thanks to McCaul, **our neighbors in Houston, Katy, Cypress, and Tomball are in danger** , as another hurricane season approaches without improvements to flood control. **If we are not safe, why should our representative be?** McCaul has done too much harm to the people of this District and the people of this country. name: Tom Perez
subject: I'm concerned, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
If you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide, then I need to know you're in before Thursday's important fundraising deadline.
---
If you're worried sick about the future of our democracy, I don't blame you, Derek. I'm as upset as anyone about what Trump and his party are doing to our country.

Whether it's the attacks on health care, the giveaways to Wall Street, the appalling treatment of immigrants, or the general corruption of this president and his party, it can be hard to keep up -- and it can be hard to not want to give up. But I'd like to make one thing perfectly, completely clear: This November, we have the power to change course in this country.

Regaining a Democratic majority in Congress is hands down the best way to hold this administration accountable and fight back. But that will require millions of people like you and me doing everything we can to win -- so if you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide, then I need to know you're in before Thursday's important fundraising deadline.

**Make your first $3 donation of 2018 to help Democrats take back Congress in November. Each contribution made before the deadline will support our candidates running in competitive races across the country.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e4a/4067b0a/5a37a51b1/7e462035/4066637700/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180526_tp_nd&source=em_20180526_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180526_tp_nd")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e4a/4067b0a/5a37a51b1/7e462030/4066637700/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180526_tp_nd&source=em_20180526_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180526_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e4a/4067b0a/5a37a51b1/7e462031/4066637700/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180526_tp_nd&source=em_20180526_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180526_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e4a/4067b0a/5a37a51b1/7e46203e/4066637700/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180526_tp_nd&source=em_20180526_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180526_tp_nd")
** We can't let ourselves get distracted, Derek -- we live in a 24-hour news cycle where our attention is always getting pulled in one direction or another. But it's critical that we keep our eyes on the prize: electing Democrats nationwide to flip the House and the Senate in November.

**If we are going to restore a sense of integrity to our nation's politics, it will require a strong Democratic Party to make it happen.** That's why we're building an organization that will help Democrats win up and down the ballot this year, while creating the grassroots organizing infrastructure to help Democrats celebrate more victories in the years ahead -- and that's why you need to be a part of it.

Here's the bottom line: The GOP is going to do whatever it takes to keep their majorities in Congress and state legislatures. They are prepared to spend any amount of money in any state for any reason to try to take our candidates down. It's critical that we're ready for whatever they throw our way -- and with your help, I know that Democrats can take on Republicans and win.

**[Thursday's deadline is an important time to show you stand with Democrats. If you're ready to take a powerful stand against this administration and vote out this GOP-led Congress, chip in $3 right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e4a/4067b0a/5a37a51b1/7e46203f/4066637700/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Thursdays+deadline+is+an+important+time+&utm_campaign=em_20180526_tp_nd&source=em_20180526_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180526_tp_nd")**

Thank you for your continued support.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- The only way to truly take on the Trump administration is by regaining a Democratic majority in Congress. **[Contribute $3 before Thursday's deadline and together we'll take back Congress in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522e4a/4067b0a/5a37a51b1/7e46203c/4066637700/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/may-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup29422+anot&utm_campaign=em_20180526_tp_nd&source=em_20180526_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180526_tp_nd")**

clean_body: If you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide, then I need to know you're in before Thursday's important fundraising deadline. If you're worried sick about the future of our democracy, I don't blame you, Derek. I'm as upset as anyone about what Trump and his party are doing to our country. Whether it's the attacks on health care, the giveaways to Wall Street, the appalling treatment of immigrants, or the general corruption of this president and his party, it can be hard to keep up -- and it can be hard to not want to give up. But I'd like to make one thing perfectly, completely clear: This November, we have the power to change course in this country. Regaining a Democratic majority in Congress is hands down the best way to hold this administration accountable and fight back. But that will require millions of people like you and me doing everything we can to win -- so if you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide, then I need to know you're in before Thursday's important fundraising deadline. Make your first $3 donation of 2018 to help Democrats take back Congress in November. Each contribution made before the deadline will support our candidates running in competitive races across the country. "" "" "" "" "" "" We can't let ourselves get distracted, Derek -- we live in a 24-hour news cycle where our attention is always getting pulled in one direction or another. But it's critical that we keep our eyes on the prize: electing Democrats nationwide to flip the House and the Senate in November. If we are going to restore a sense of integrity to our nation's politics, it will require a strong Democratic Party to make it happen. That's why we're building an organization that will help Democrats win up and down the ballot this year, while creating the grassroots organizing infrastructure to help Democrats celebrate more victories in the years ahead -- and that's why you need to be a part of it. Here's the bottom line: The GOP is going to do whatever it takes to keep their majorities in Congress and state legislatures. They are prepared to spend any amount of money in any state for any reason to try to take our candidates down. It's critical that we're ready for whatever they throw our way -- and with your help, I know that Democrats can take on Republicans and win. "" Thank you for your continued support. Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee P.S. -- The only way to truly take on the Trump administration is by regaining a Democratic majority in Congress. name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Fellow West Virginian,

I was just talking to Joe about his plans for the Memorial Day weekend, and he wanted me to pass along a special message to you all:

"On this Memorial Day, remember all those who served and died so that our nation remains the strongest in the world. Let us never forget that Freedom is not Free. As we head into the weekend, I'm reminded of a poem that my Uncle Jimmy taught me when I was a child. It's about our Flag, the banner of liberty that generations of Americans have fought and died to protect. May God continue to shine on our great nation on this Memorial Day." \- Joe

Poem from A. James Manchin

It's only some stripes of red and white.
It's only some stars on a field of blue.
It's only a little cotton flag.
Does it mean anything to you?
Oh yes it does,
For beneath its folds
Our people are safe at land and sea.
It stands for a land where God is still king,
And His truth and His freedoms are free.
So let us love it well
And keep it pure as our banner of liberty.

Joe leads Morrisey by 8%

Our campaign released a poll from Global Strategy Group that shows Joe Manchin beating Patrick Morrisey 50 to 42. Learn more about it [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAsv2q6MYCr7urydXyJfz1AEzojzhOdLWXrK8zJXX4nWKeHjzmD9tfCO%2fJ574c4dGl6bVoirGi4dIgPaDq%2f0bXe%2fJKpBY4FIPJDWLNDRQtovAQ%3d%3d).

It's great news for Joe, but our campaign isn't taking anything for granted. We will continue to focus on Joe's record of bipartisan work that gets results for working families.

Joe is the most independent Senator in Washington and will never stop fighting for West Virginia. You can sign up to volunteer and help Joe by clicking [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAsXLyGi1Tj0skcoKyPQEI0y6JGuoJsbwbe%2bE3AIn34d2x5UXy3f3AgbBGKUYX7MnO0WQgDQR9JMIy%2fELkKxab3y).

Transit Workers Endorse Joe

The Amalgamated Transit Union (ATU Local 1742) announced it's endorsement of Joe Manchin in 2018. They represent bus drivers, transit workers, and mechanics in West Virginia.
Learn more about why working families are supporting Joe [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAvhCBMHWYgZkgpYhJJTg1mjGzMy4IDitO5Pix7xmgPFBLa5KHQ5%2b7Osr%2fsZWb3mVpFFn7IlVdnKPIlWruWzvUMMEyd57S1zclnNE%2fOQ3IPYyAsDGh%2besL9ca4SLDQEnqwY%3d).

_" The people who get up everyday to work hard and earn a paycheck to provide for their family won't forget that Joe Manchin is clear choice in 2018." _-- David Sayre, president of ATU Local 1742.

Expanding Rural Broadband

In case you missed it, Joe recently made headlines for his work to expand rural broadband to West Virginians. It's one of the reasons he voted to protect consumers and support net neutrality. See it [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKdsMdKtQ9SXuk6ofAPn6UgqpDC6NuSBSClyZlRaOqeud7Bp03UF57g2zpLRzrwzhGgmMUTCkEZQJ6mYP9pn3zeRVX4ciT9f9HGC2YWdFgqbwP%2fChGlMae8YZuLjjedUiG2TkO%2b8untvNOjbBo0EdSHs%3d).

Parade Season Is Here!

This last weekend, Joe visited the Strawberry Festival in Upshur County. We had a great show of support for Joe. See more [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKcvCUINtMjzHxkMfal3XDjO%2fZA0NOgwGKOeYYje1Kiym8kkrafGrZMlPzaXWl4EFyRkArzXSkjwPE7aelLPQw8bYDGTBsdKOGL2ZsBpTp3gBHvf8MJaeIdGoK03fFWakJkyYxmYxwS%2fhazzRkWhbhXBK2DfUqvdaYILHx697KAVQYC7pg87tyjkuVY7LEFym9w%3d%3d).

This weekend, Joe will be visiting Grafton for Memorial Day.

Remember our Gold Star Families,

Mara

Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Friend,
Under the guise of a new "farm bill," Congressional Republicans recently attempted to cut out school meals for approximately 265,000 impoverished children.
Funds currently earmarked for food stamps for more than 400,000 households would have been diverted into an unproven workforce training program with no provisions for childcare or transportation.
The partisan bill have would gutted conservation programs while gift-wrapping the removal of crop-subsidy size limits for Big Agriculture.
[**Please -- show your support for America 's family farmers and most vulnerable citizens with a contribution to my campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r2HCKQs7XPeAi0g19AGwUgppT1oDgCzFKp168rO6b9E=/nc6CwdzfX7RgBWq_1EkVJXIz4EbgaDzlLrZ4-X-cbX4=?refcode=May-26-The-Farm-Bill)
Not surprisingly, my Republican opponent for the District 25 seat voted in favor of this thinly veiled corporate welfare. Fortunately, the bill failed -- for now.
**But, as repeated attempts to repeal Obamacare and Medicaid by Republicans in Congress have taught us, another assault is just a matter of time.**
And if we don't flip the House in November, Medicare and Social Security will be next.
[**Neither the onslaught on the social safety net nor handouts to big business will stop unless we take back Congress! Donate $5, $25, or whatever you can afford today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r2HCKQs7XPeAi0g19AGwUgppT1oDgCzFKp168rO6b9E=/nc6CwdzfX7RgBWq_1EkVJXIz4EbgaDzlLrZ4-X-cbX4=?refcode=May-26-The-Farm-Bill)
Thanks for supporting me in this pivotal fight,
**\- Mary**

subject: Survey Results Are In
body:

| Peter, Last week in a survey to all My Faith Votes followers we asked, should the U.S. Senate use the “Nuclear Option” to change the rules to speed up the confirmation process for President Trump’s nominees? President Trump has almost 300 hundred nominees for court seats and executive posts that are waiting to be confirmed by the Senate. It is taking an average of 84 days to confirm each nominee, which is 55% longer than the four presidents who preceded President Trump. Thousands of you responded and according to our survey results, you overwhelmingly believe the Senate should use the “Nuclear Option” to change the rules to speed up the confirmation process. I will share these results with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. Thank you to all who took the survey! We appreciate your insight on these important issues. Let’s continue to unite in prayer to see nominees confirmed who defend Judeo-Christian values. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates

clean_body: | | Your answer is clear! | Peter, Last week in a survey to all My Faith Votes followers we asked, should the U.S. Senate use the “Nuclear Option” to change the rules to speed up the confirmation process for President Trump’s nominees? President Trump has almost 300 hundred nominees for court seats and executive posts that are waiting to be confirmed by the Senate. It is taking an average of 84 days to confirm each nominee, which is 55% longer than the four presidents who preceded President Trump. Thousands of you responded and according to our survey results, you overwhelmingly believe the Senate should use the “Nuclear Option” to change the rules to speed up the confirmation process. I will share these results with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. Thank you to all who took the survey! We appreciate your insight on these important issues. | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | **The NRA has officially entered our race, endorsing a Republican opponent with an A+ rating from the gun lobby**

**We need 4,000 more people to make sure we are standing 20,000 signatures strong against the NRA.[Add your name here >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f132a/3e0906/67f4ad69/3e34c220/1435154644/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-the-nra?source=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+herenbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS")**
---
Derek,

We are in the middle of a movement, led by students, that can be _(and needs to be)_ successful once and for all.

Tim has been standing with students, with concerned parents, and with gun violence prevention activists all across the Commonwealth as we fight for commonsense solutions.
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f132a/3e0906/67f4ad69/3e34c227/1435154644/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-the-nra?source=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS") [**STOP THE NRA**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f132a/3e0906/67f4ad69/3e34c226/1435154644/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-the-nra?source=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+STOP+THE+NRA&utm_campaign=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS")
---
And Tim has continued with the same message: **We can 't be afraid of the NRA. We can take them on and we can win. But we need 20,000 signatures.**

Tim knows that the majority of Americans want gun reform, and they want their representatives to get OUT of the pocket of the NRA and powerful gun lobby.

[Derek, we noticed you haven't signed yet. Sign your name to our petition if you stand with the majority that demands an END to the NRA's stronghold on Congress >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f132a/3e0906/67f4ad69/3e34c225/1435154644/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-the-nra?source=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-++if+recipientfirstname++recipientfirstna&utm_campaign=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS")

We're seeing it right here in Virginia.

After Parkland and after students marched for their own safety, Tim reached out to his community to show support. On the contrary - Republican Senate hopefuls leaned right back into the gun lobby.

**In fact, the NRA just pledged their full support behind a Republican opponent and are all in to make sure he gets elected to the Senate and can further their agenda.**

[We need to keep the pressure on, Derek. We need to prove we have the numbers on our side, and these numbers will lead to electoral power that CAN stop the NRA. Sign your name before it's too late >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f132a/3e0906/67f4ad69/3e34c224/1435154644/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/stop-the-nra?source=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+We+need+to+keep+the+pressure+on+if+recip&utm_campaign=20180526_1_PET_TEAM_NRA-NS")

Thanks for never giving up,

_Team Kaine_

name: Adela Parvaiz
subject: Our home in the 7th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

My name is Adela Parvaiz, and my family immigrated to the U.S. in the 1980s. My husband, Oz and I are proud Americans. There is no other place in the world that we call home, which is why the negative rhetoric of the 2016 election cycle was alarming to us. We felt alone, and openly wondered whether or not our country still believed in the words of Lady Liberty:
Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free...
A few weeks after the election cycle ended, my husband Oz met Abigail and her husband Adam at a local park. As it happens, our children are in the same class. Oz came home and told me how excited he was to have met Abigail and Adam, and how they had talked about our generations' responsibility to protect and uphold everything that is great about our country -- mainly the principles of equality and inclusion.

Our conversations with Abigail and Adam continued over the next few months, with mutual friends at pizza parties, brunches, and parks. Abigail may not have known it at the time, but she was organically **bringing together** a community of people who'd all felt displaced at the end of 2016. As we all spoke, and listened to each other, we didn't quite feel as alone anymore.

On one occasion, Abigail invited a group of us to meet up at Shady Grove Elementary Park. It was a cold day and the wind was blowing. We all huddled together in a circle while our children played. And even though it was bitterly cold and the wind cut through our clothes, we felt warm, standing with our friends. And perhaps more importantly, **we felt like we were home again.**

At the time, we often wondered if Abigail would run for office. We even spoke to her about it a couple of times. And we promised her that if she did run for office we would do everything we could to support her.

Our support for Abigail isn't about politics, left or right, blue or red, Democrat or Republican -- it is instead deeply personal. We plan on voting for Abigail because she made our family feel like the 7th district was our home again. And if Abigail can make our family feel like the 7th District is home, then she will make every family feel like the 7th district is home. **Please join us in our quest to help Abigail Spanberger flip the 7th by voting on June 12th****.**

Regards,

Adela Parvaiz

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsJhy1Q_oek1cJ0_JuI9STXb-8s1r5u2tgUaJ5BxOfU=/enb06mS3Ei-nZuoQlRWNlisH5OerMtYhnanlqvrQMu4=?refcode=adela)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsJhy1Q_oek1cJ0_JuI9STXb-8s1r5u2tgUaJ5BxOfU=/IEfhggviUrA4-nFUGS31G-t0XC_zb40--Tb78GWf6fQ=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsJhy1Q_oek1cJ0_JuI9STXb-8s1r5u2tgUaJ5BxOfU=/pXjB_hz4BsNgU4jYiBS7Nrinw7O-_03p04S8MEaaWcc=)_

name: Jim Zogby, Our Revolution
subject: Cuomo is pulling out all the stops
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Tom Perez just did the one thing the DNC Chair shouldn't do and the one thing he, himself, promised not to do -- he put his "thumb on the scales" in a Democratic primary contest
#
Friends,
**Tom Perez just did the one thing the DNC Chair shouldn't do and the one thing he, himself, promised not to do -- he put his "thumb on the scales" in a Democratic primary contest** by formally endorsing Andrew Cuomo for governor. He did this in spite of the fact that the DNC Bylaws say the national party should be impartial in primaries. This endorsement maintains a broken status quo in our party and in New York politics.
‪No matter what some national Democrats might say, Andrew Cuomo has not been a champion for progressive politics in New York. Instead, he has enabled the Independent Democratic Caucus, a group of state senators that caucus with the Republican Party, to stall legislation and shield him from the public backlash of having to veto it himself. That's not progressive leadership.
While corporate America is taking over our party, Our Revolution is working to elect candidates that will transform the Democratic Party.‬ Cynthia Nixon is our kind of transformative, progressive candidate.
[**Cynthia Nixon is running to change the status quo and she can win. We need you to help us build a grassroots movement across New York from the central committee to the governor's office. Split a $5 contribution to Our Revolution and Cynthia Nixon's campaign today.‬**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab1f/bed43eb/6cd1d252/75fdd1a6/1117552510/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nixon?refcode=em180526-full&noskip=true")
‬‪Cynthia is fighting for all New Yorkers. She's calling for more funding for public education instead of draining taxpayer dollars in privately-run, unaccountable charter schools. She's advocating to fix our broken subway system and a statewide infrastructure that continues to crumble under the strain of a growing population. And she's not afraid of taking on big money and corporate interests to do it.‬
‪I'll tell you what's going to decide this race. It's going to be whether ordinary people can band together and chip in what they can--time, money, or just their vote--to defeat a state party machine in Albany that too often looks to donors first and ordinary people last.‬
‪Can we expand the electorate and get new people to vote in this primary? That's a question that will be decided by the strength of Cynthia's campaign, and the resources they have to reach new people in every part of the state.‬
[**‪Your investment today will help us continue to push our progressive agenda in New York and across the country. Help us build a grassroots movement in New York --split a $5 contribution to Cynthia Nixon's campaign and Our Revolution today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ab1f/bed43eb/6cd1d252/75fdd1a6/1117552510/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nixon?refcode=em180526-full&noskip=true")
‪Cynthia is giving voters a reason to feel excited. We have thousands of grassroots supporters ready to support candidates up and down the ballot to end the influence of corporations in our government and our party. Thank you for building this movement with us.‬
In solidarity,
Jim Zogby
Board Member
Our Revolution

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Is $7.25 enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Just one question: Tell me what you think about the federal minimum wage.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7908b/2f5ea88d/7126088d/2cbcca56/1619659673/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/federal-minimum-wage?utm_source=ema_2018-05-26_minimum-wage&source=ema_2018-05-26_minimum-wage&utm_campaign=minimum-wage&utm_medium=ema") Friend, The last time Congress voted to raise the federal minimum wage: May 25, 2007 -- eleven years ago yesterday. It was pegged at $7.25 an hour -- and there it has stayed for the better part of the last decade. Let me ask you something -- have your bills gone up since then? Ours sure have. Here in Washington, we understand that the cost of living rises every year, and everyone deserves to earn a living wage. clean_body: Just one question: Tell me what you think about the federal minimum wage. | "" Friend, The last time Congress voted to raise the federal minimum wage: May 25, 2007 -- eleven years ago yesterday. It was pegged at $7.25 an hour -- and there it has stayed for the better part of the last decade. Let me ask you something -- have your bills gone up since then? Ours sure have. Here in Washington, we understand that the cost of living rises every year, and everyone deserves to earn a living wage. Our minimum wage is $11.50 an hour statewide, increasing to $13.50 by 2020. So tell me what you think: Do you think the federal minimum wage should be higher? | | "" | | "" Very truly yours, Jay Inslee ""

In 1979, at the age of 23, I joined the Marine Corps in my hometown of Columbus, Indiana.

_I know the sacrifice men and women make to serve our country. They deserve our utmost respect and appreciation for putting their lives on the line to protect our freedoms._

**May is Military Appreciation Month** , a special time we set aside to honor these brave heroes for their service to our nation.

Every single one of us knows someone who has served our country in the United States Armed Forces. In fact, there are more than 46,000 Hoosier veterans living right here in the 6th District.

Our active duty troops, reserve members, veterans, and their families deserve our recognition every day for the sacrifices they’ve made to keep our country safe.

**[In honor of Military Appreciation Month, please sign our card to show your support for our troops and their families>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=0c106eafa551497c810b5e95dcb345f2&_e=ux1r1PcCTHXEsJcvzcSmmhMRuIxQ0CVPUCYCFNBBp1S-cPDro86dP3I9mjvkeZBLWteLKj1bNQz4pymcK-rAYn5oFyF7omldBeecJF7Hp-UJI3I0jclsGOssoSvAe5wiRnsAYXuOJLx9k86dK8A76z9nx1oRJDJy_OKzfziTgXspYboeU6WJDkIWVMdfnjJmlCqO7ZNalBoZpAsGRdyHfurNmEL4QuDbSBj4v4Zc1J9eeYRinGVqQLHFDFLQr4ZEQHhfjL68rHqYplGwAXNxUJNtcjj3jbJ3thPllONLQg6tSukULiOT4in3q5moyhZIq1y1rcDx4DWLBauR7CtQMOWPM_7Q3oWPKoDLaKHejLMHXYezdPibbGGv0iRIhzLJN5gD6ZJgmcvf6rJWIg1A4inWOE_MWpjSIDzvq2P77DKWg96Leufu_bCXNUBfLz0w)**

**If we lose the battle for Senate control, here's what could happen next: Obamacare gutted. Medicare slashed. And more extremist, anti-choice Supreme Court nominees.**
